name: li-zoe-x--market-test-price
description: Fetch token prices from OKX DEX Market Price API (v6). Use this skill when a user wants to: 1. Get the latest price of one or more tokens on supported EVM/Solana chains 2. Batch query token prices (up to 100 tokens per request) for portfolios or UIs 3. Build applications that need real-time DEX market price data Core value: Correct authenticated POST requests with JSON body, HMAC-SHA256 signing including body in prehash, and proper handling of batch request/response.
